introSection: Naga Bay is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. Prior to the 2017 season, the ride was known as Dizz.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride first opened as Dizz on 9 April 2011.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.

fullText:
Naga Bay is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Bobbejaanland in Lichtaart, Antwerp, Flemish Region, Belgium. Prior to the 2017 season, the ride was known as Dizz.

The ride first opened as Dizz on 9 April 2011.



Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.
